Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Some of your Social Links might invite you to hang out on days when you don't have school. Spending time with friends will give you a chance to build your relationships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Saying yes to an invitation will {f 0 1 2}automatically fill your schedule for that afternoon{f 0 1 27}, and your free time will be dedicated to that hang-out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If someone sends you an invite message, you don't need to respond immediately. However, the hang-out will no longer be available if you don't respond the day you receive the invitation.[n]{f 1 1}
